commands.review_summary:
The PR lets `cron.update` payload patches use `model: null` to clear a stored cron agent-turn model override, and updates Gateway protocol validation, cron tool schemas/canonicalization, regression tests, and docs.

PR surface: Source +16, Tests +174, Docs +1. Total +191 across 13 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source: current main normalization drops `payload.model: null`, and the service merge path has no null-clear branch for `model`. I did not run a live daemon repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainers need to choose the canonical branch/API shape because https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/91387 overlaps this fix and broadens the clear semantics; there is no narrow automated repair needed on this PR.

target.title: fix(cron): clear payload model overrides
target.body:
## Summary
- Allow `cron.update` payload patches to clear a stored `payload.model` override with `model: null`.
- Keep create/full cron payloads strict: `model: null` is only a patch clear signal and is never stored or returned as a full job payload value.
- Update Gateway protocol validation, cron tool schema/canonicalization, focused regression tests, and cron docs for the supported clear behavior.

Closes #91298

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Cron update payload patches can now clear a stored `payload.model` override with `null`, so existing jobs can return to inheriting the agent/default model without delete-and-recreate.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw worktree `fix/91298-cron-payload-null-clear` at commit `87af108140`, based on upstream `439dcbde3b`, running on macOS with Node 24 and repository TypeScript source loaded through `tsx`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```bash
node --import tsx -e 'import { normalizeCronJobPatch } from "./src/cron/normalize.ts"; import { applyJobPatch } from "./src/cron/service/jobs.ts"; const job = { id: "cron-clear-model", name: "clear model", enabled: true, schedule: { kind: "every", everyMs: 60000 }, sessionTarget: "isolated", wakeMode: "next-heartbeat", payload: { kind: "agentTurn", message: "run report", model: "openai/gpt-5.5", toolsAllow: ["exec"] }, delivery: { mode: "announce", channel: "telegram", to: "chat-123" }, createdAt: "2026-06-08T00:00:00.000Z", updatedAt: "2026-06-08T00:00:00.000Z" }; const patch = normalizeCronJobPatch({ payload: { kind: "agentTurn", model: null } }); applyJobPatch(job, patch, "2026-06-08T00:01:00.000Z"); console.log(JSON.stringify({ normalizedPatch: patch, payloadAfter: job.payload, deliveryAfter: job.delivery }, null, 2));'
```

Evidence after fix:

```json
{
  "normalizedPatch": {
    "payload": {
      "kind": "agentTurn",
      "model": null
    }
  },
  "payloadAfter": {
    "kind": "agentTurn",
    "message": "run report",
    "toolsAllow": [
      "exec"
    ]
  },
  "deliveryAfter": {
    "mode": "announce",
    "channel": "telegram",
    "to": "chat-123"
  }
}
```

Observed result after fix: The normalized patch preserves the explicit `model: null` clear request, and applying the update removes the stored `payload.model` while preserving unrelated payload and delivery fields.

What was not tested: I did not start a long-running live Gateway daemon. The changed path is covered through cron normalization, service merge/replacement behavior, Gateway RPC tests, Gateway protocol validation, and cron tool regression tests.

## Validation
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cron/service.jobs.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/server.cron.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cron/normalize.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs packages/gateway-protocol/src/cron-validators.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tools/cron-tool.schema.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tools/cron-tool.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 docs/automation/cron-jobs.md packages/gateway-protocol/src/cron-validators.test.ts packages/gateway-protocol/src/schema/cron.ts src/agents/tools/cron-tool-canonicalize.ts src/agents/tools/cron-tool.schema.test.ts src/agents/tools/cron-tool.test.ts src/agents/tools/cron-tool.ts src/cron/normalize.test.ts src/cron/normalize.ts src/cron/service.jobs.test.ts src/cron/service/jobs.ts src/cron/types.ts src/gateway/server.cron.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm docs:list`
- `pnpm docs:check-links`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` clean: no accepted/actionable findings

Known validation gaps:
- `pnpm prompt:snapshots:check` produced no output and timed out locally after 10 minutes in this worktree; no prompt snapshot files were generated.
- `pnpm docs:check-i18n-glossary` reported unrelated pre-existing changed-label glossary entries against this worktree's comparison base; `docs:check-links` passed and this PR only changes one sentence in `docs/automation/cron-jobs.md`.

## Scope note
This intentionally addresses only the `payload.model: null` clear behavior requested by #91298. It does not expand the API to nullable `fallbacks`, which keeps the compatibility surface smaller than the broader competing PRs.
